# DiscoverResult.Meta property

OPTIONAL. Result-level metadata envelope (§5.3.2, R-5.3.2-k). Carries arbitrary protocol-defined or vendor `_meta` keys; absent when the server attaches none. Serialized under the wire key `_meta`.
